Bash(git -C /Users/zhaobo/data0/person/myTrader commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat(schema): add five-section full DB schema + portfolio report downloader

DB migration 68fd8567e039 adds 7 new tables keyed by update frequency:
- research_tech_snapshots       (daily)     tech score + MA/MACD/RSI/KDJ/BOLL
- research_fund_flow_snapshots  (daily)     main force + north-bound net flow
- research_valuation_daily      (daily)     PE/PB with 1/3/5yr quantile
- research_fundamental_detail   (quarterly) income/balance/cashflow per period
- research_capital_cycle_snapshots (monthly+event) capex phase + shareholder behavior
- research_announcements        (daily scan) cninfo key disclosures index
- research_report_metadata      (on-gen)    index of all generated reports

Alters existing tables:
- fundamental_snapshots: + data_period / ocf_to_profit / debt_ratio
- composite_scores: + UNIQUE KEY
- sentiment_scores: + UNIQUE KEY

Also adds:
- download_portfolio_reports.py: batch download 3yr annual+quarterly PDFs for all holdings
- cninfo_downloader.py: fix Q1/Q3 title filter to prevent cross-contamination

Bash(git -C /Users/zhaobo/data0/person/myTrader commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat(financial-fetcher): add akshare data fetcher for income/balance/dividend

Adapted from example code with key changes:
- Replace sqlalchemy with project config.db storage layer
- Fix akshare API compatibility: use market-prefixed codes (sh/sz)
  for profit/balance sheets and SECUCODE format (600015.SH) for
  financial analysis indicator API
- Update column mappings for akshare 1.18.x (OPERATE_INCOME instead
  of TOTAL_OPERATE_INCOME, ROEJQ instead of WEIGHTAVG_ROE)
- Use stock_financial_analysis_indicator_em for bank-specific data
  (NPL, provision coverage, CAR, NIM) with proper column mapping
- Add ROE backfill from bank indicators into income records
- Add loan_total merge from bank indicators into balance records

Smoke tested with 600015 (华夏银行): 269 rows saved across 4 tables.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
